title: Submit CV
description: Applicants can submit their CVs for parsing and analysis.

title: View and Edit CV
description: Applicants can view and edit their parsed CV.

title: Answer Screening Questions
description: Applicants are presented with screening questions defined by an expert recruiter.

title: Get Rating for CV
description: Applicants receive a rating for their CV based on the similarity between the applicant's CV and the job requirements.

title: Parse CV
description: The system uses natural language processing (NLP) to parse the CV and extract key information such as skills and years of experience.

source.start_index: ResuFit is a web-based application designed to ease the hiring and recruitment process

title: Compare CV with Job Requirements
description: The system compares the extracted information from the CV with the job requirements specified by the recruiter.

source.start_index: The system utilizes cosine similarity and Jaccard to assess the alignment between the extracted information from the CV and the job requirements specified by the recruiter.

title: Validate and Score Applicant Responses
description: Applicant responses are verified and graded by comparing them to an expert-generated model, and the applicant's answers are validated and scored by ChatGPT.

source.start_index: The applicant’s answers are validated and scored by ChatGPT.

title: Generate Percentage-Based Result
description: The system generates a percentage-based result that represents the applicant's overall suitability for the role by averaging the CV ranking and screening question validation scores.

source.start_index: A percentage-based result that represents the applicant’s overall suitability for the role by averaging these scores.
